enquiry.title: Start your enrolment enquiry
enquiry.subtitle: Tell us which field interests you and how to reach you. Our team follows up personally — no online payment, no obligation.
enquiry.name: Full name
enquiry.consent: I agree to be contacted by One World about this enquiry.
enquiry.successTitle: Thank you — your enquiry is on its way.
enquiry.successBody: One World will get back to you shortly via your preferred channel.
enquiry.whatsappPrefill: Hello, I'd like to enquire about a CIC programme.

errors.missing_fields: Please enter your name and email.
errors.bad_email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.consent_required: Please agree to be contacted so we can follow up.
errors.spam: We couldn't verify your submission. Please try again.
errors.server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.
